title: Structures Plus II
description: This mod improves the Vanilla experience without adding a single item, Includes 40+ structures all around the world (including The Nether and The End), from simple structures to Mansions, Villages, and Dungeons
body:
About:

This mod improves the Vanilla experience without adding a single item, Includes 40+ structures all around the world (including The Nether and The End), from simple structures to Mansions, Villages, and Dungeons

Examples:
![air baloon](https://i.imgur.com/b9QYgWN.png)
(spawns in every biome, just look above :)

![fairy vill](https://i.imgur.com/jpMVOgB.png)
(spawns naturally in dark forests you won't overlook it trust me)

![under vill](https://i.imgur.com/bQsssEZ.png)
(rare underground structure populated by friendly Villagers)

![desert dungeon](https://i.imgur.com/rRy93VQ.png)
(quick and fun dungeon experience includes a miniboss on the top)

 

More images in the "Images" section, spoiling everything would make things boring :)

Featured Videos:
